[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
34.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

34.gl: to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver)
34.kj: [idiom] abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, [idiom] hide, lift up a standard.

34.gl: (as noun) a circle, neighbour, or environs; but chiefly (as adverb, with or without preposition) around
34.kj: (place, round) about, circuit, compass, on every side.

34.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
34.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
34.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

34.gl: to make away with (specifically by swallowing); generally, to destroy
34.kj: cover, destroy, devour, eat up, be at end, spend up, swallow down (up).

35.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
35.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

35.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
35.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
35.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

35.gl: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
35.kj: (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

35.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
35.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

35.gl: a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction
35.dv: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral
